SEARCH

Uses of Package
io.goobi.viewer.model.search

Packages that use io.goobi.viewer.model.search
Package
Description
io.goobi.viewer.api.rest.resourcebuilders
Builder classes that assemble REST response payloads for complex resources such as annotations, IIIF manifests, bibliographic text, table of contents, and bookmarks.
io.goobi.viewer.controller
Core controller and utility classes of the Goobi viewer.
io.goobi.viewer.dao
Data access layer of the Goobi viewer.
io.goobi.viewer.dao.impl
JPA-based data access object implementation providing the full persistence layer for the Goobi viewer, including a custom class loader and the central JPADAO that covers all entity types.
io.goobi.viewer.faces.converters
JSF Converter implementations that translate between domain objects (such as users, roles, bookmarks, CMS pages, and date/time values) and their string representations for use in Facelets forms.
io.goobi.viewer.managedbeans
JSF managed beans (CDI backing beans) of the Goobi viewer.
io.goobi.viewer.model.bookmark
Model for user bookmark lists, allowing authenticated and anonymous users to collect and manage references to digitized records, including session-scoped storage support.
io.goobi.viewer.model.cms
Top-level CMS model containing cross-cutting entities such as navigation items, categories, sliders, static page mappings, highlight data, and shared selection abstractions used throughout the content management system.
io.goobi.viewer.model.cms.itemfunctionality
Functionality interfaces and implementations that attach pagination and navigation behaviour to CMS content components such as search, browse, TOC, and bookmark views.
io.goobi.viewer.model.cms.pages.content.types
Concrete CMS content type implementations, each representing a distinct kind of embeddable content block such as search, browse, media, metadata display, record lists, or maps.
io.goobi.viewer.model.export
Provides export functionality for viewer records, supporting formats such as Excel (XLSX) and RIS, including field configuration for controlling which metadata columns are exported.
io.goobi.viewer.model.iiif.presentation.v3.builder
Provides builders for assembling IIIF Presentation API 3 resources such as manifests, canvases, ranges, and annotation pages from Goobi viewer record data.
io.goobi.viewer.model.search
Provides the core search domain model for the Goobi viewer, covering search queries, facets, hit representation, browse elements, filters, and Solr result processing.
io.goobi.viewer.model.search.query
Contains low-level query building utilities for constructing and evaluating Solr search queries used by the Goobi viewer search layer.
io.goobi.viewer.model.security.user
Contains the user domain model for the Goobi viewer, including user accounts, groups, roles, IP ranges, activity tracking, and related utility methods.
io.goobi.viewer.model.viewer.collections
Provides model classes for hierarchical collection browsing, including the CollectionView that manages tree state and Solr queries, and browse element types for flat and hierarchical DC collections.
io.goobi.viewer.modules.interfaces
Defines the extension interfaces that viewer modules must implement, covering URL construction and Solr index augmentation.
  • Classes in io.goobi.viewer.model.search used by io.goobi.viewer.api.rest.resourcebuilders
    Class
    Description
    SearchHit
    Wrapper class for search hits.
  • Classes in io.goobi.viewer.model.search used by io.goobi.viewer.controller
    Class
    Description
    AdvancedSearchFieldConfiguration
    Configuration element for advanced search fields.
    SearchFilter
    Represents a configurable search scope filter (e.g. restricting search to a specific collection or document type).
    SearchResultGroup
    Used for creating separate groups of search results for a single query.
    SearchSortingOption
     
  • Classes in io.goobi.viewer.model.search used by io.goobi.viewer.dao
    Class
    Description
    Search
    Persistable search query.
  • Classes in io.goobi.viewer.model.search used by io.goobi.viewer.dao.impl
    Class
    Description
    Search
    Persistable search query.
  • Classes in io.goobi.viewer.model.search used by io.goobi.viewer.faces.converters
    Class
    Description
    SearchSortingOption
     
  • Classes in io.goobi.viewer.model.search used by io.goobi.viewer.managedbeans
    Class
    Description
    AdvancedSearchFieldConfiguration
    Configuration element for advanced search fields.
    AdvancedSearchOrigin
    Holds information about the record from which an advanced search was triggered (e.g. from the TOC view).
    BrowseElement
    Representation of a search hit.
    CollectionResult
    Contains additional information of collections searched by SearchHelper.findAllCollectionsFromField(java.lang.String, java.lang.String, java.lang.String, boolean, boolean, java.lang.String).
    FacetItem
    Represents a single facet value with its display label, hit count, and selection state.
    HitListView
    Enumerates the available display modes for a search result list: DETAILS shows full detail cards, TILES shows a tile/grid layout, and LIST shows a compact list.
    IFacetItem
     
    Search
    Persistable search query.
    SearchFacets
    Current faceting settings for a search.
    SearchFilter
    Represents a configurable search scope filter (e.g. restricting search to a specific collection or document type).
    SearchHit
    Wrapper class for search hits.
    SearchInterface
    Interface that all classes must implement that may be used in jsf search masks SearchBean is the default implementation.
    SearchQueryGroup
    Searches query group for the advanced search.
    SearchResultGroup
    Used for creating separate groups of search results for a single query.
    SearchSortingOption

    Representation of a search hit.

    Class
    Description
    SearchInterface
    Interface that all classes must implement that may be used in jsf search masks SearchBean is the default implementation.

    SearchFilter
    Represents a configurable search scope filter (e.g. restricting search to a specific collection or document type).
    SearchInterface
    Interface that all classes must implement that may be used in jsf search masks SearchBean is the default implementation.

    Description

    Contains additional information of collections searched by SearchHelper.findAllCollectionsFromField(java.lang.String, java.lang.String, java.lang.String, boolean, boolean, java.lang.String).

  • Classes in io.goobi.viewer.model.search used by io.goobi.viewer.model.search
    Class
    Description
    AdvancedSearchFieldConfiguration
    Configuration element for advanced search fields.
    BrowseElement
    Representation of a search hit.
    CollectionResult
    Contains additional information of collections searched by SearchHelper.findAllCollectionsFromField(java.lang.String, java.lang.String, java.lang.String, boolean, boolean, java.lang.String).
    FacetItem
    Represents a single facet value with its display label, hit count, and selection state.
    FacetItem.FacetType
    Enumerates the structural types of a facet field, determining how its values are queried, displayed, and filtered in the search UI.
    FacetSorting.SortingMap
    A map container indicating the the contained map is created using one of the getSortedMap methods.
    GeoCoordinateFeature
     
    GeoFacetItem
     
    HitListView
    Enumerates the available display modes for a search result list: DETAILS shows full detail cards, TILES shows a tile/grid layout, and LIST shows a compact list.
    HitType
    Classifies a search hit by the type of Solr document it originates from, such as a record, structure element, metadata group, user-generated content entry, or CMS page.
    IFacetItem
     
    Search
    Persistable search query.
    SearchAggregationType
     
    SearchChildHit
    Class to represent children of SearchHit which don't represent a complete record and thus need less data.
    SearchFacets
    Current faceting settings for a search.
    SearchFilter
    Represents a configurable search scope filter (e.g. restricting search to a specific collection or document type).
    SearchHit
    Wrapper class for search hits.
    SearchHitFactory
    Factory class that constructs SearchHit objects from Solr documents, enriching them with metadata, thumbnails, child hits, and access permission information.
    SearchQueryGroup
    Searches query group for the advanced search.
    SearchQueryGroup.SearchQueryGroupOperator
    Enumerates the logical operators used to combine multiple SearchQueryItems within a group.
    SearchQueryItem
    Field/operator/value tuple for the advanced search.
    SearchQueryItem.SearchItemOperator
    Enumerates the logical operators (AND, OR, NOT) available for combining values within a single search query item.
    SearchQueryItemLine
    Object representing a single line with operator + value(s) within an item.
    SearchResultGroup
    Used for creating separate groups of search results for a single query.
    SearchSortingOption
